content:
# ProjectX Documentation

## Overview

ProjectX uses **workspaces** to organize your content. Each workspace contains multiple projects.

## Getting Started

Create your first **project** to begin. Projects are the top-level container in ProjectX.

See [Installation Guide](./docs/install.md) for setup instructions.

## Configuration

Configure your **space** settings in the admin panel. Spaces can be shared across teams.

For advanced configuration, refer to the [API Reference](./api/reference.md).

## API

### POST /api/workspaces

Creates a new workspace.

### GET /api/projects/:id

Retrieves a project (also called a space).

### PUT /api/containers/:id

Updates a container's settings.

## Troubleshooting

If your space is not loading, see [Debugging Guide](./docs/debugging-guide.md).
For workspace issues, contact support.
Check the [FAQ](./docs/frequently-asked-questions.md) for common project questions.
